# SBDC Training Events Process

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## Training process The UH SBDC training section separates in-person events, webinars, Spanish webinars, and trainer applications. ## How BOSS should route

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns legal and compliance, training and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## Training process
- The UH SBDC training section separates in-person events, webinars, Spanish webinars, and trainer applications.
- ## How BOSS should route
- If the user wants structured learning: route to Training.
- If the user is near Houston and wants live interaction: route to In-Person Events and filter by location/topic.
- If the user needs flexible learning: route to Webinars and filter by topic/format.
- If the user prefers Spanish: route to Spanish Webinars.

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC), University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Training.asp>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to Small Business Development Center (SBDC) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
